summary: Frontend-only Home retest completed on local static preview (http://127.0.0.1:3456). Desktop editorial vendor composition, supporting sections, and mobile vendor navigation all work as requested with Indonesian copy and premium light visual preserved.
action_items: Optional maintainability improvement: split HomeScreen into smaller sections/components to reduce file size and future regression risk.
critical_code_review_comments: `/app/frontend/presentation/screens/HomeScreen.tsx` is 700+ lines; this exceeds the size guideline and should be modularized (hero/vendor/editorial/supporting sections).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scope tested: Home desktop composition, supporting landing sections, mobile Home load, and mobile vendor navigation. No regression found in Indonesian copy/tone for Home. NOTE: n8n availability and booking submission webhooks are MOCKED and were not part of this Home-only validation.
rca_of_issue: No functional issue reproduced in this iteration for the requested Home checks.
